DECLARATION OF DARIN T. JUDD IN RESPONSE TO COURTS TENTATIVE RULING GRANTING DEFENDANT AVIANO ENTERPRISES INCS MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 62590845) FILED BY DEFENDANT AVIANO ENTERPRISES, INC.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT AVIANO ENTERPRISES, INC. IS GRANTED, SUBJECT TO (1) NO LATER THAN 9:00 A.M. ON OCTOBER 24, 2018 DEFENDANT (BY MR. DELUCA) SHALL FILE A DECLARATION UNDER THE PENALTY OF PERJURY STATING THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THIS MOTION RE: SURPRISE, MISTAKE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. THE DECLARATION MUST INCLUDE THE DATE WHEN THIS ACTION WAS TENDERED TO INSURANCE, THE DATES OF ANY FOLLOW-UP INQUIRIES, AND THE DATE WHEN DEFENSE WAS ACCEPTED; (2) NO LATER THAN 9:00 A.M. ON OCTOBER 24, 2018 DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT A DECLARATION EXPLAINING THE DELAY IN FILING OF THIS MOTION BETWEEN AUGUST 27, 2018 (PLAINTIFF'S REFUSAL TO STIPULATE) AND SEPTEMBER 21, 2018 (FILING OF THIS MOTION); AND (2) PAYMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S FEES INCURRED IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULT AND OPPOSING THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A DECLARATION RE: ATTORNEY'S FEES NO LATER THAN 9:00 A.M. ON OCTOBER 24, 2018. REMITTANCE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1875.00 SHALL BE DUE NO LATER OCTOBER 30, 2018. THAN MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN CONFORMITY WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

Darin Judd, 415.448.5000 (counsel arrived late; no card or name provided) for Defendant/Moving party Aviano Enterprises, Inc.

Discussed. The Court rules as follows: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Entered Against Defendant Aviano Enterprises, Inc. is GRANTED, subject to (1) no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 24, 2018 Defendant (by Mr. Deluca) shall file a declaration under the penalty of perjury stating the facts giving rise to this motion re: surprise, mistake or excusable neglect. The declaration must include the date when this action was tendered to insurance, the dates of any follow-up inquiries, and the date when defense was accepted; (2) no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 24, 2018 Defendant's counsel shall submit a declaration explaining the delay in filing of this motion between August 27, 2018 (Plaintiff's refusal to stipulate) and September 21, 2018 (filing of this motion); and (2) payment of Plaintiff's fees incurred in obtaining the default and opposing this motion. Plaintiff shall provide a declaration re: attorney's fees no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 24, 2018. Remittance in the amount of $1875.00 shall be due no later October 30, 2018. than Moving party to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
